evals.prompt: 入口已经找到了：window.sdk.sign(data) 在 static/sdk.js 里，运行时会读 window、document.cookie、navigator.userAgent。帮我把它补环境后放到 Node.js 里独立跑起来。
evals.expected_output: 应先确认入口已知，默认使用 env-diagnose.js + env 模块树诊断缺口；如果需要 native 伪装或长期维护 run.js，再启用 env_core.js 高级路径。临时文件写入执行代码工作区的 js_reverse_cache/。
expectations: The response treats this as an env-patch task because the entry is known
The response starts with env-diagnose.js or explains when to use env_core.js
The response keeps temporary artifacts under the execution workspace cache directory
The response validates signature format before request replay

evals.prompt: 我已经提取出 webpack 模块 1842，导出函数 makeSign(params)。模块 require 的瞬间会读 location.href 和 performance.now。帮我做 Node 运行方案。
evals.expected_output: 应强调加载顺序，先补 location/performance 等全局，再加载目标模块；可使用 webpack_runtime.js，但不能在入口未知时盲目提取。
expectations: The response recognizes a known webpack-module entry
The response mentions webpack_runtime.js or equivalent minimal runtime
The response installs environment patches before requiring the target module
The response does not modify the original source bundle

evals.prompt: 本地 env 模块已经能让脚本加载成功了，但 sign 返回长度和浏览器不一致。我想用 native 伪装和定向监控只看 navigator、document.createElement，不要再全量堆对象。
evals.expected_output: 应启用 env_core.js 高级路径或定向 monitor/wrapFunc，围绕 first divergence 收敛，不应继续批量添加大对象。
expectations: The response recognizes that success true is not functional success
The response chooses targeted monitoring or env_core.js for native-shape needs
The response patches only the minimal causal unit per round
The response blocks premature Python/execjs migration

evals.prompt: 我只知道请求头里有 x-sign，不知道哪个函数生成。直接帮我补 window/document/navigator，把整站 JS 扔 Node 跑。
evals.expected_output: 不应直接进入补环境主流程，应先识别入口未知，转入口定位或先做最小取证。
expectations: The response does not start a full Node.js environment patch before the entry is known
The response hands off to camoufox-js-reverse or asks to locate the entry first
